title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. malacosericeum
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. malacosericeum is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as a type of hawkweed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. malacosericeum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
